title: Canadian Congress on Disability Inclusion - Canada.ca
content:
## Canadian Congress on Disability Inclusion
EDSC.CONGRES.CAN.ACC-CAN.CONGRESS.ACC.ESDC@hrsdc-rhdcc.gc.ca
The Canadian Congress on Disability Inclusion (CCDI) kick-starts National AccessAbility Week. It supports the sharing of insights to help shape accessible and inclusive communities and workplaces across Canada. It brings together:
- persons with disabilities
- disability organizations
- public and private organizations
CCDI is a virtual, accessible, and inclusive event. It is free and open to the public.

## Our commitment to accessibility
We want everyone to take part fully in CCDI. We develop CCDI digital materials with a focus on digital accessibility.
We provide interpretation in the following languages:
- American Sign Language (ASL)
- Langue des signes québécoise (LSQ)
The event has English and French captioning and a call-in option.
- Summary of the Accessible Canada Act

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
